full_text:
Zhongli Yin 鍾離駰
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhongli Yin (鍾離駰)was born in Shanyin county, Kuaiji commandery. Told people to stop mocking his brother Zhongli Mu for his stuttering. Zhongli Yin was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
